title: epidendrum englerioides
intro: Epidendrum englerioides, also known as the orchid tree, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Orchidaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Epidendrum englerioides include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's extracts are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
